title: SARS-CoV-2 Sequencing Protocol Using Illumina Nextera Flex & MiSeq - Part 1
author: Opentrons
materials: This protocol is a semi-automated workflow which performs 8.1-8.4.6 of the SARS-CoV-2 Using Illumina Nextera Flex & MiSeqNEB kit. For detailed information on protocol steps, please see below. You can find part 2 of the protocol here: * [SARS-CoV-2 Using Illumina Nextera Flex & MiSeqNEB - Part 2](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/5b16ef) Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of Sample Columns (1-6)`: Specify how many sample columns (1-6) this run will process. Samples will be placed in every other column, starting from column 1 (i.e. 1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11 for 6 columns). * `P20 Multi-Channel Mount`: Specify which mount (left or right) to host the P20 pipette. ---
User incubates and runs plate on thermal cycler.
Split columns are recombined to the left.

steps.title: 2ul of mastermix is added to samples and mixed
steps.instruction: 2ul of mastermix is added to samples and mixed.

steps.title: Pool reagent is added to final plate cols (split columns)
steps.instruction: Pool reagent is added to final plate cols (split columns).
4.5ul of sample are split from sample plate into final plate.
